message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state and agent storage

Routine sync of local issue tracker and agent storage artifacts from
concurrent multi-agent session activity.

- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated issue metadata (4 insertions, 3 deletions)
- storage.sqlite3: grown from ~250KB to ~422KB reflecting accumulated
  agent session data, extension scoring results, and lifecycle state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
